hooks.command: echo "Checking if git command is 'commit'..." | grep -E "git commit" && echo "🔍 Running pre-commit code formatting check..." && (git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM | grep -E '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx|css|json|md|html)$' | xargs -r echo "Files to check:" || echo "No files to check") && (git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM | grep -E '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx|css|json|md|html)$' | xargs -r prettier --check --ignore-unknown 2>/dev/null || echo "Prettier check completed or not installed") && (git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM | grep -E '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$' | xargs -r eslint --fix 2>/dev/null || echo "ESLint check completed or not installed") && echo "✅ Pre-commit check completed"
echo "🔔 Task completed!" && powershell -Command "Write-Host '🎉 任务完成！' -ForegroundColor Green; [Console]::Beep(800, 300); Write-Host '提示音已播放' -ForegroundColor Yellow"
